children.heading: Issuance
children.label: 1 Issuance
children.text: The Secretary, subject to the procedures provided in subsection (b), shall issue orders under this chapter applicable to manufacturers of concrete masonry products.

children.heading: Scope
children.label: 2 Scope
children.text: Any order shall be national in scope.

children.heading: One order
children.label: 3 One order
children.text: Not more than 1 order shall be in effect at any one time.

children.heading: Development or receipt of proposed order
children.label: 1 Development or receipt of proposed order
A
children.text: proposed by the Secretary at any time; or

children.label: i
children.text: an existing national organization of concrete masonry product manufacturers; or

children.label: ii
children.text: any person that may be affected by the issuance of an order.

children.heading: Publication of proposed order
children.label: 2 Publication of proposed order
children.text: If the Secretary determines that a proposed order received in accordance with paragraph (1)(B) is consistent with and will effectuate the purpose of this chapter, the Secretary shall publish such proposed order in the Federal Register not later than 90 days after receiving the order, and give not less than 30 days notice and opportunity for public comment on the proposed order.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: After notice and opportunity for public comment are provided in accordance with paragraph (2), the Secretary shall issue the order, taking into consideration the comments received and including in the order such provisions as are necessary to ensure that the order is in conformity with this chapter.

children.heading: Effective date
children.label: B Effective date
children.text: If there is an affirmative vote in a referendum as provided in , the Secretary shall issue the order and such order shall be effective not later than 140 days after publication of the proposed order.section 8706 of this title

children.heading: Amendments
children.label: c Amendments
children.text: The Secretary may, from time to time, amend an order. The provisions of this chapter applicable to an order shall be applicable to any amendment to an order.
